## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Verification

<!-- Commands run, or why they were not run. -->

- [ ] `bash check-docs.sh` was run for documentation changes.

## Documentation And ADR Checklist

- [ ] If Markdown files were added, moved, or removed, `docs/README.md` was updated.
- [ ] If this completes, deletes, or archives a plan, the plan links an ADR or includes `No ADR needed:` with a short reason.
- [ ] If this changes public API, removes/deprecates a subsystem, resolves a large issue, establishes policy, or supersedes an earlier decision, an ADR was added or updated.
- [ ] If this changes likely next tasks for coding agents, memory was updated.
